title: Handwriting and Document Examination Reports
summary: Structured summary of retained forensic document examination reports dated June 20, 2024 and April 26, 2026.

scope: Questioned versions of a July 28, 2019 will
Seven known-signature documents containing nine Gina Gazvoda signatures
opinions_summary: The examiner reported characteristics she considered indicative of alteration or manipulation in the questioned documents.
The examiner expressed opinions that two questioned documents appeared non-genuine when compared with submitted templates.
For one questioned signature, the examiner expressed an elimination opinion that it was not written by Gina Gazvoda when compared with the known exemplars.
limitations: Analysis was performed on reproduced, non-original documents.
Comparison templates were not held to a particular regulated or mandated standard.
Copying and scanning can distort document and handwriting features.
Findings depend on the submitted copies accurately reproducing the originals.

scope: Questioned handwriting in a July 28, 2019 will
Five submitted known Nicholas Forte handwriting exemplars
reports.opinion_summary: The examiner expressed a high-probability opinion that the questioned handwriting was written by Nicholas Forte when compared with the submitted known-writing samples.
limitations: Dates or contemporaneousness of some known exemplars
Materials examined were copies rather than original documents
The examiner reserved the right to inspect originals or additional exemplars and supplement the report
reports.attestation: The report states that the examiner affirmed it on April 26, 2026 under penalties of perjury under New York law and that compensation was not contingent on the outcome or any particular opinion.

examiner_background_as_reported.name: Grace Warmbier
education: Bachelor of Science in Forensic Science, University of New Haven, 2012
Bachelor of Science in Biology, University of New Haven, 2012
employment: New York City Police Department Police Laboratory, Criminalist III, 2013-2023
Suffolk County Crime Laboratory, Questioned Documents and Trace Sections intern, 2011
examiner_background_as_reported.verification_note: These qualifications were verified as statements contained in the report package; Justice for Gina did not independently certify licensing, accreditation, or admissibility.

scope_limitations: The reports do not determine Gina Gazvoda's cause or manner of death.
The reports do not establish criminal guilt or motive.
The reports are retained-expert opinions, not court findings.
The full packages contain signatures, addresses, comparison exhibits, and personal records requiring controlled review.

provenance.review_method: Direct visual and text review of the June 20, 2024 and April 26, 2026 report packages
provenance.notes: The public page paraphrases the reports and preserves attribution, methods, limitations, and scope.

page_citations: April 26, 2026 Handwriting/Document Examination Report, pages 1-5 and attached résumé
redaction_notes: The public summary excludes addresses, signatures, financial or medical records, and full comparison exhibits.
publication_authority: Family-authorized expert-material summary with explicit attribution and limitations.

revision_history.change_summary: Replaced placeholder metadata page with a source-complete public summary and structured record.
